results.question: What does the Grampian Operational Pressure Escalation System (G-OPES) provide?
results.expected_answer: A single approach to evaluate pressure across the health and care system; a system view focusing on pathways of care; options to increase capacity through risk/pressure-based derogations; a whole system approach to share risk and offer internal mutual aid; clarity for staff; transparency; specific protection of time-critical planned care
